video:video.video:title: CounselConduit — Privilege-Preserving Legal AI
video:video.video:description: The Shopify for Legal AI. Route your firm through frontier LLMs without breaking attorney-client privilege.

video:video.video:title: CounselConduit Hero — Cinematic Drift
video:video.video:description: Cinematic hero drift animation for the CounselConduit privilege-preserving legal AI platform.

video:video.video:title: CounselConduit Billing Explainer

video:video.video:title: CounselConduit Hero Intro

video:video.video:description: Streamlined onboarding experience for law firms integrating with CounselConduit.
